/home/runner/work/dlt-daemon/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dlt-logstorage-ctrl.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/dlt-logstorage-ctrl.dir/dlt-logstorage-ctrl.c.o" "CMakeFiles/dlt-logstorage-ctrl.dir/dlt-logstorage-common.c.o" "CMakeFiles/dlt-logstorage-ctrl.dir/dlt-logstorage-list.c.o" "CMakeFiles/dlt-logstorage-ctrl.dir/__/dlt-control-common.c.o" -o dlt-logstorage-ctrl  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/dlt-daemon/dlt-daemon/_codeql_build_dir/src/lib: ../libdlt_control_common_lib.a ../../lib/libdlt.so.3.0.1 -lrt
